untranslatable_reason: This signal requires fundamental valuation metrics (cash-flow-to-price ratio, book-to-market ratio, decile ranking by fundamental value) which are NOT available in the allowed indicator list. The backtest engine only supports technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume ratios, z-scores, and returns). Decile-based portfolio formation requires access to cross-sectional fundamental data and historical time-series rankings that cannot be replicated with technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: Signal SSRN_227016_16 is a fundamental value reversion strategy based on cash-flow-to-market-value-of-equity ratios with annual rebalancing. It requires: (1) calculating cash-flow-to-price ratio for all stocks, (2) ranking into deciles, (3) forming long/short portfolios in deciles 10 and 1 respectively, (4) holding for 5 years with annual rebalancing. None of these operations can be performed with technical indicators alone. This would require a multi-asset portfolio construction module with access to fundamental data feeds.
